_comment: Partials now driven by tp1_r and tp1_close_pct â€” no more hardcoded halfway/50%.
tp1_r=1.0 means partial fires at exactly 1R profit.
tp1_close_pct=0.6 means 60% of position closed at TP1.
Remaining 40% runs to full TP or SL.
tp1_sl_mode=BE_PLUS moves SL to entry+0.05R after partial fires.
Set tp1_close_pct=0.6 if you want 60% closed at TP1 (matches settings.json).
